description:
The Ralph Wiggum Loop has taken the AI development world by storm. Use by developers like Matt Pocock, Ryan Carson, Ben Davis and so on. But there's a massive problem, many people are implementing it WRONG. In this video, I break down exactly what the creator intended versus what you (yes, even Anthropic) are actually doing, revealing the critical mistakes that turn this powerful automated bash loop into a wasted computing resource. 

🔗 Relevant Links
Ras Mic Ralphy - https://github.com/michaelshimeles/ralphy
Geoff Huntley Loom - https://github.com/ghuntley/loom
Model Degradation - https://arxiv.org/html/2502.05167v3
Matt Pocock Context - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-uW5-TaVXu4
Ryan Carson's Ralph - https://x.com/ryancarson/status/2008548371712135632

❤️ More about us

0:30 Ralph Wiggum Loop Recap
0:51 Model Degradation from Context
3:00 Why Ralph is Genius
5:00 The Problem with Compaction
5:33 Why The Anthropic Plugin Got Ralph Wrong
6:22 Why Ryan Carson's Approach is Wrong
6:52 The Future of Ralph
